scripts.e2e:maestro: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir . -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-maestro.ts
scripts.e2e:maestro:studio: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir . -- bash -lc 'export MAESTRO_APP_ID=${MAESTRO_APP_ID:-host.exp.exponent}; export MAESTRO_OPEN_LINK=${MAESTRO_OPEN_LINK:-exp://10.0.2.2:8081}; export WORKER_BASE_URL=${MAESTRO_WORKER_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:8787}; export PATH="$HOME/.maestro/bin:$PATH"; maestro studio apps/expo/.maestro'
scripts.serve: cd apps/expo/builds && ifconfig en0 | grep 'inet ' | awk '{print $2}' && python3 -m http.server 8080
scripts.check: bash -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$PATH"; if [ "$1" = "--fix" ]; then vp check --fix; else vp check; fi && pnpm run lint:keys && pnpm run typecheck' --
scripts.lint: source ~/.vite-plus/env && vp lint && pnpm run lint:keys
